page_title: "Data Source: okta_authorization_servers_policies_rule"

---

# Data Source: okta_authorization_servers_policies_rule

Retrieves an authorization server policy rule by `ruleId` from Okta.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "okta_authorization_servers_policies_rule" "example" {
  id             = "<rule id>"
  auth_server_id = "<auth server id>"
  policy_id      = "<policy id>"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `auth_server_id` (String) `id` of the Authorization Server
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the authorization server policy rule.
- `policy_id` (String) `id` of the policy

### Read-Only

- `created` (String) Timestamp when the rule was created
- `last_updated` (String) Timestamp when the rule was last modified
- `name` (String) Name of the rule
- `priority` (Number) Priority of the rule
- `status` (String) Status of the rule
- `system` (Boolean) Set to `true` for system rules.
- `type` (String) Rule type

### Blocks

#### `actions`

- `token` (Block) Token action settings
  - `access_token_lifetime_minutes` (Number) Lifetime of the access token in minutes.
  - `refresh_token_lifetime_minutes` (Number) Lifetime of the refresh token is the minimum access token lifetime.
  - `refresh_token_window_minutes` (Number) Timeframe when the refresh token is valid.
  - `inline_hook` (Block) Inline hook configuration
    - `id` (String) ID of the inline hook

#### `conditions`

- `grant_types` (Block) Grant types condition
  - `include` (List of String) Array of grant types that this condition includes.
- `people` (Block) People condition - identifies users and groups
  - `groups` (Block) Groups condition
    - `include` (List of String) Groups to be included
  - `users` (Block) Users condition
    - `include` (List of String) Users to be included
- `scopes` (Block) Scopes condition
  - `include` (List of String) Array of scopes that the condition includes
